title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Bombay Shaving Company - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Bombay Shaving Company - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bombay Shaving Company! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bombay Shaving Company:
Bombay Shaving Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Shaving Company!
